message:
feat: wire template resolver into session, cache system prompt

Add buildPromptData() and renderSystemPrompt() to Session, replacing
the per-round prompt assembly in processOneInput() with a cached
template-rendered system prompt. The cache is refreshed whenever
rebuildPromptCache() runs (session init, RegisterTool).

Falls back to legacy buildInitialSystemPrompt() when --system-prompt
is set, BasePromptOverride is active, or template rendering fails.

Test adjustments:
- context window test: increase cw to accommodate template-rendered prompt
- user instruction override test: trim trailing whitespace in assertion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
